properties.event: Hay River / K'atlodeeche First Nation ice-jam river flood
properties.when_public_reports: Evacuation ordered night of 2022-05-10; major surge reported 2022-05-12; re-entry began 2022-05-15.
properties.methods_note: MNDWI (S2) + VV backscatter change (S1 GRD) are complementary: optical sees water/sediment where clear; SAR penetrates cloud and is sensitive to surface water / roughness. Neither is calibrated flood depth.
